name: Nevado del Ruiz
eruptionHistory: The 1985 eruption triggered a lahar that destroyed the town of Armero, killing approximately 23,000 people — one of the deadliest volcanic disasters in history.
description: Nevado del Ruiz is infamous for the 1985 Armero tragedy, when lahars from a small eruption killed over 23,000 people. It remains one of the most dangerous volcanoes in Colombia.
